items.title: Shock, concern and celebration: Venezuelans react to US strikes | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>A few Venezuelans went out to the largely empty streets of Caracas, hours after the US bombed the country and captured President Nicolas Maduro. Some of them expressed concern there may be more violence, while many living abroad celebrated.

#News #Reuters #Newsfeed #venezuela #caracas #nicolasmaduro #unitedstates #donaldtrump 

Read the story here: https://reut.rs/49kMbVI

items.title: Trump says Maduro captured, US will run Venezuela | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>The US attacked Venezuela and deposed its long-serving President Nicolas Maduro in an overnight operation, President Donald Trump said, in Washington's most direct intervention in Latin America since the 1989 invasion of Panama.

#News #Reuters #Newsfeed #venezuela #nicolasmaduro #unitedstates #donaldtrump 

Read the story here: https://reut.rs/4juBHb2

items.title: Venezuelans in Doral, Florida celebrate the capture of Maduro | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Members of the Venezuelan community in Doral, Florida gathered to celebrate the capture of President Nicolas Maduro after Donald Trump announced in a social media post that the US attacked Venezuela and deposed their long-serving leader.

#News #Reuters #Newsfeed #venezuela #nicolasmaduro #unitedstates #donaldtrump 

Read the story here: https://reut.rs/44WcMqG

items.title: Trump says US will run Venezuela after Maduro capture
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>President Donald Trump said U.S. officials would take control of Venezuela after capturing its long-serving President Nicolas Maduro in a dramatic overnight operation.
 
#trump #maduro #venezuela #capture #politics

items.title: Venezuelans in Florida celebrate capture of Maduro
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Venezuelan migrants around the world, including those in Doral, Florida, erupted in celebration following the U.S.-led deposition of President Nicolas Maduro, whose government prompted one of the largest migration crises in recent history.
 
#trump #usa #maduro #venezuela #florida

items.title: LIVE: Trump speaks after US strikes on Venezuela, Maduro capture
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>U.S. President Donald Trump holds presser after the United States said it captured Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro and his wife, and flew them out of the country.
 
#venezuela #caracas #trump #usa #maduro #live #Reuters #News

Keep up with the latest news from around the world: [https://www.reuters.com/](https://www.reuters.com/)</article>

items.title: LIVE: Maduro's supporters protest in Caracas
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Supporters of the Venezuelan government gather in the capital to protest the U.S. capture of President Maduro.

#venezuela #caracas #trump #usa #maduro

Keep up with the latest news from around the world: https://www.reuters.com/</article>

items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Venezuelans gather in Santiago to celebrate news of a U.S. military operation to capture President Maduro.

#venezuela #caracas #maduro #chile #santiago #live #Reuters #News

items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Kim Jong Un inspected a greenhouse-farm construction site along North Korea’s border with China, state-run television KRT reported.

items.title: Venezuelan VP demands ‘proof of life’ of Maduro and wife from Trump
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>The Venezuelan government does not know the whereabouts of President Nicolas Maduro or his wife Cilia Flores, Vice President Delcy Rodriguez said on January 3 in audio on state TV, after the U.S. captured its long-serving leader according to President Donald Trump.
#venezuela #maduro #trump #capture #caracas</article>

items.title: Trump says US will run Venezuela
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>President Donald Trump says the United States will run Venezuela until a proper transition of power can be arranged. The declaration comes after the US captured Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro in a dramatic overnight operation. Maduro and his wife are en route to the United States to face criminal charges.



*This podcast was updated after President Trump's news conference.



Listen to On Assignment here (https://www.reuters.com/podcasts/retribution-reconciliation-syria-2026-01-03/) .



Listen to Reuters Morning Bid podcast here (https://www.reuters.com/podcasts/reuters-morning-bid/stampede-or-stumble-how-will-2026-test-stock-bulls-2026-01-01/) .

items.title: Earthquake strikes Mexico during president's press conference
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>A 6.5-magnitude earthquake struck Mexico’s Guerrero state on January 2, disrupting President Claudia Sheinbaum’s morning press conference in Mexico City and triggering evacuations.
 
#earthquake #mexico #sheinbaum</article>
